next_action: Proceed to the next offline runner slice if needed. Runtime/NAS/QMT/credential/provider/lake/catalog/trading remains unauthorized.
summary: CR134 adds lightweight evidence index output for successful offline Strategy Runner runs. The index is derived from RunResult, references the redacted evidence summary, keeps not_authorization=true and qmt_allowed=false, and blocked runs do not write misleading pass indexes.
title: Runner Evidence Index Integration
